name: DEV-MOCHI
mission: Project-focused status line for Claude Code
pitch: Keep every AI agent focused on your project — not on being cute
vision: Single source of truth that every agent, worktree, and session reads on startup
moonshot: Auto-updating project context that syncs across all agents and surfaces blockers before you hit them
brief: Replace pet sprites with project identity. Zero token cost. One config file.
stack: Node.js · Claude Code Status Line API
roadmap: THEN: Multi-project support with directory-aware config switching
MOON: Auto-populate from git history, CI status, and issue trackers
